### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>docker/docker-credential-helpers (github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers)</summary>

### [`v0.9.4`](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/releases/tag/v0.9.4)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/compare/v0.9.3...v0.9.4)

#### What's Changed

- update to go1.25.1 [#​387](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/387)
- wincred: fix unsafe uintptr usage to be GC-safe on go1.25 [#​386](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/386)
- gha: add macos-15-intel, remove macos-13 (deprecated) [#​384](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/384)
- deb: Dockerfile: update to debian bookworm, ubuntu jammy (22.04) [#​385](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/385)
- Dockerfile: update xx to v1.7.0 [#​383](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/383)
- Dockerfile: update golangci-lint to v2.5 [#​386](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/386)
- Dockerfile: merge build stages [#​249](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/249)
- build(deps): bump github.com/danieljoos/wincred v1.2.3 [#​388](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/388)
- build(deps): bump softprops/action-gh-release from 2.2.1 to 2.3.2 [#​373](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/373)
- build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 4 to 5 [#​376](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/376)
- build(deps): bump actions/setup-go from 5 to 6 [#​377](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/377)
- build(deps): bump actions/github-script from 7 to 8 [#​378](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/378)
- build(deps): bump softprops/action-gh-release from 2.3.2 to 2.3.3 [#​379](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/379)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/compare/v0.9.3...v0.9.4>

</details>
